intake.user_request: Fix IMP-CORE-087: DryRunSemanticOrchestrator.interceptFileWrites() monkey-patches global fs but never restores originals, leaking the patch into subsequent process calls and test suite runs.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Single-file fix in src/cli/semantic-integration.ts. No blast radius into other modules. Targeted surgical change with clear test path.

in_scope: src/cli/semantic-integration.ts — add restore() method, call it after processProject()/processFile()

constraints: Must not change the public interface of DryRunSemanticOrchestrator
restore() must be idempotent (safe to call multiple times)
